title: Anatomy of a Cryptocurrency Wallet
description: A flowchart illustrating the key components of a blockchain wallet and their relationships, showing how public and private keys interact with the blockchain network.
relationships: User interacts with the UI to view balance or send funds
Public Key is derived from the Private Key and is shared to receive funds
Private Key is used by the Signing Function to authorize transactions
Signed transactions are broadcast to the Blockchain Network for validation
Blockchain Network updates the ledger and reflects the balance for the Public Key
